nasb.text: But the king of Egypt said to them, “Moses and Aaron, why do you draw the people away from their work? Get back to your labors!”

esv.text: But the king of Egypt said to them, “Moses and Aaron, why do you take the people away from their work? Get back to your burdens.”

cnv.text: 埃及王對他們說：“摩西、亞倫哪，你們為甚麼使人民懶惰不作工呢？去挑你們的擔子吧。”

ccb.text: 埃及王说：“摩西、亚伦，你们竟敢煽动百姓旷工！快回去工作！”
